features.name: regreset inside inline layer layerblock
features.description: Code should include a regreset (register with async reset) defined inside an inline layer's layerblock, which triggers a use-before-def lowering bug in LowerToHW
features.snippet:
layer Verif, inline :
  layerblock Verif :
    regreset go_c_value : UInt<2>, clock, reset, UInt<2>(0h0)
